nodes.itemHTML: • JS-Beautifierstars7.3k - Npm cli and library to format JS code.

• MxNet.Sharpstars136 - .NET Standard bindings for Apache MxNet with Imperative, Symbolic and Gluon Interface for developing, training and deploying Machine Learning models in C#. https://mxnet.tech-quantum.com/
• Zulip requires-approval - Chat for distributed teams.
• Iooxastars83 - Web components for interactive scientific writing, reactive documents and explorable explanations.
• Create a simple Note-taking app with Deno
• Attacking .NET deserialization - Written by @pwntester.
• .NET Roulette: Exploiting Insecure Deserialization in Telerik UI - Written by @noperator.
• Architecture Patterns with Python - A book about Pythonic application architecture patterns for managing complexity.
• Slony-I - "Master to multiple slaves" replication system with cascading and failover.
• Juliastars1.1k - High-level dynamic programming language designed to address the needs of high-performance numerical analysis and computational science.
• pg-differstars30 - Tool for easy initialization / updating of the structure of PostgreSQL tables, migration alternative (Node.js).
• Bruce Momjian's PostgreSQL blog
• pgMustard - A modern user interface
• pg_docs_botstars12 - Browser extension to redirect PostgreSQL docs links to the current version.
• go-sqlstars141 - A easy ORM for mysql.

• Avolites Titan - PC version of the Titan software which runs on the Avolites desk. Free to use until version 11.4 although it spits out random data once in a while. Requires a dongle from version 12. ⚠ not free.
• EOS Family - Software for ETC's EOS-family consoles. ⚠ freemium.
• GrandMA2 software - Free, offline software for the GrandMA2 lighting console. Includes GrandMA2 OnPC and MA3D. Does not output DMX for free. ⚠ freemium.
• GrandMA3 software - Free, offline software for the new GrandMA3 lighting console. Includes GrandMA3 OnPC. Does not output DMX for free. ⚠ freemium.
• Hog 4 software - Free, offline software for the Hog 4 lighting console. Includes Hog 4 pc. Does not output DMX for free. ⚠ freemium.
• QLC+ - QLC+ is a free and cross-platform software to control DMX or analog lighting systems like moving heads, dimmers, scanners etc. Source Codestars475 ✓ open-source.
• xLights - Meant for home Christmas light shows but is a great way to sync lights to music on a budget. Source Codestars236 ✓ open-source.

• Capture - Documentation and visualisation software. Capture is a native macOS and Windows application that lets you work with lighting, video, laser, moving scenery and water effects. Does have a free Student Edition. ⚠ freemium.
• Depence² - Depence² is a unique application, which combines the design and visualization process with the potential to control the real show. ⚠ not free.
• wysiwyg - wysiwyg is an all-in-one lighting design software with fully integrated CAD, plots, data, visualization and virtual show control. ⚠ not free.
• Audacity - Audio file editor and analysis tool, great for cropping down sound effects and music tracks. ✓ open-source.
• Ardour - A full realtime audio recording and editing suite. Source Codestars2k ✓ open-source.
• Linux Show Player - Free cue player designed for stage productions. Source Codestars113 ✓ open-source.
• QLab - QLab is sound, video, and lighting control for macOS. ⚠ freemium.
• REAPER - REAPER is a complete digital audio production application for computers, offering a full multitrack audio and MIDI recording, editing, processing, mixing and mastering toolset. ⚠ freemium.
• Livescriptstars4 - Insert a musical/theatre-script from Google Docs and use this for a live "autocue" and scroller with everyone on the site. ✓ open-source.
• StageClock - StageClock is a Java based graphical timekeeping application. It outputs a clean feed from an attached monitor, and has time/date, timer, and show information. ⚠ freemium.
• AutoCAD - AutoCAD® is computer-aided design (CAD) software that architects, engineers, and construction professionals rely on to create precise 2D and 3D drawings. ⚠ not free.
• TCgeneratorstars2 - Reaper time marker to GrandMA2 TC Generator. ✓ open-source.
• Timecodestars14 - ArtNet and LTC timecode generator, made with Java. ✓ open-source.
• TimelordMTC - Advanced timecode management tool. ⚠ not free.
• M2Qstars3 - Python application capable to trigger Chamsys Consoles/Software via MIDI for advanced synchronized shows. ✓ open-source.
• AES67 WebMeterstars4 - Server that receives an AES67 audio stream and presents a webpage with meters. ✓ open-source.
• meters.lv2stars123 - meters.lv2 is a collection of audio-level meters with GUI in LV2 plugin format. ✓ open-source.
• Open Sound Meter - Clean, open-source sound meter. Supports RTA, magnitude, phase and impulse response, coherence, group delay and more. ✓ open-source.
• Open Lighting Architecture - A framework for lighting control information. Supports a range of protocols and over a dozen of USB devices. Source Codestars429
• Blender ArtNetstars14 - Blender script to push ArtNet data to Evee lights. Runs at 30fps with Evee rendering in the viewport. ✓ open-source.
• MIDI Monsterstars253 - MIDIMonster is a universal control and translation tool. It can translate between many different protocols such as MIDI, Artnet, sACN and OSC. ✓ open-source.
• Ansitheusstars13 - Ansible playbook to containerize, configure and deploy Prometheus ecosystem by ntk148v.
• Ansible-prometheusstars70 - Ansible playbook for installing Prometheus monitoring system, exporters such as: node, snmp, blackbox, thus alert manager and push gateway by Ernestas Poskus.
• Click-to-deploy Prometheus - Source for Google Click to Deploy Prometheus solutions listed on Google Cloud Marketplace by GoogleCloudPlatform.
• Prometheus Operatorstars5.7k - Prometheus Operator creates/configures/manages Prometheus clusters atop Kubernetes by CoreOS.
• pagicstars1.1k - The easiest way to generate static html page from markdown, built with Deno.
• DataFormsJSstars101 - Standalone Components for SPA routing, displaying data from web services, and more.
• ricksaystars24 - Quotes from Rick and Morty.
• AMPstars14.6k - Web component framework for easily creating user-first websites, stories, ads, emails and more.
• AXA Pattern Librarystars65 - AXA CH UI components library built with Web Components.
• Brightspace UI corestars17 - Collection of web components for building Brightspace applications.
• Clever componentsstars80 - Collection of Web Components made by Clever Cloud.
• Elixstars559 - High-quality, customizable web components for common user interface patterns.
• Lion Web Componentsstars1.1k - Set of highly performant, accessible and flexible Web Components.
• LRNWebComponentsstars170 - ELMS:LN produced web components for any project.
• Microsoft Graph Toolkitstars545 - Collection of web components for the Microsoft Graph.
• Nuxeo Elementsstars18 - Components for building web applications with Nuxeo using Web Components.
• Tradeshift Elementsstars12 - Reusable Tradeshift UI Components as Web Components.
• Wired Elementsstars8.6k - Set of common UI elements with a hand-drawn, sketchy look.
• Wokwi Elementsstars34 - Web Components for Arduino and various electronic parts.
• Amber Componentsstars22 - Web Components implementation of the Amber Design System.
• Calcite Componentsstars109 - Shared Web Components for Esri's Calcite design framework.
• Chameleon Web Componentsstars23 - Collection of framework-agnostic elements based on the Chameleon Design System.
• Helix UIstars38 - Web Component library for the Helix Design System.
• Material Web Componentsstars2.5k - Material Design implemented as Web Components.
• NuML | NUDE Elementsstars260 - HTML Framework and Design System based on Web Components and runtime CSS generation.
• PatternFly Elementsstars194 - Collection of flexible and lightweight Web Components based on the Unified Design Kit.
• Pearson Web Components - Pearson's shareable component library implementing Gravity design system.
• Spectrum Web Componentsstars349 - Adobe Spectrum design language implementation built with Web Components.
• UI5 Web Componentsstars917 - Set of reusable UI elements implementing SAP Fiori Design Guidelines.
• Zooplus web componentsstars33 - Set of web components that implement Z+ shop style guide.
